## What does this PR do?

## Type of change
- [ ] New content document
- [ ] Content update/correction
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] `achub validate --all` passes
- [ ] Content docs have all required frontmatter fields
- [ ] Content docs include Sources section with verifiable links
- [ ] `last_verified` date is current
- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`)
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check src/`)
